key_points: Move-out day is chaotic: 20 min to vacate 8th floor in rain
Roommate conflicts handled slowly; RA escalation unclear
Campus housing revitalization project underway but long overdue
key_quotes: They gave us 20 minutes to get everything out of an 8th floor double in Southwest. It was pouring rain.
I had to move two kids out of o hill because their room molded.
I'm sleeping at a friend's dorm at the moment.

key_points: Party culture is intense; Blarney and Halloweekend are massive events
Super Bowl guest restrictions felt controlling to students
Geese, murals, campus ponds — quirky community culture is real
key_quotes: grab your nips grab your green shirt and most important GRAB YOUR ENERGY
I am seeing a bunch of people posting stuff on YikYak
every person is allowed two guests — but only from their residence area

key_points: Consistently ranked #1 in Princeton Review; students genuinely love it
Frank dining hall gets the most praise; orange chicken iconic
WSJ called it one of the hottest tables in America
key_quotes: Frank always has the best orange chicken imo
You will eat very well. Lol.
My daughter attends UMass Amherst (#1 for food in Princeton Review) and, yes, the food is pretty good.

key_points: Burnout hits early; commuter students especially struggle to connect
Freshman homesickness and isolation are common at large campus
Dean of Students office exists but students don't always know it
key_quotes: I just started at UMass this year, and I'm exhausted... I constantly feel like I'm doing college 'wrong' somehow.
I just feel so alone... when I'm alone I just feel like I'm sinking and homesick and want to cry all the time.
my mom died last year and what i did is email and meet irl with an academic dean in my department

key_points: In-state tuition hit $39k/year — no longer the cheap option
Middle-class families often get zero aid and no merit money
OOS students can land full rides or Chancellor's Awards with strong stats
key_quotes: Umass is 39k a year now. Beacon hill needs to do something about this.
umass is giving me no aid whatsoever... right now its the most expensive option for me out of all my acceptances.
i got into honors, i got in with a FULL RIDE!!! im low income from a horrible household

key_points: CS and nursing are competitive and well-regarded nationally
Isenberg business school is hard to get into as internal transfer
Some professors criticized for lazy teaching and outsourcing to textbook videos
key_quotes: If you're in CS UMass Amherst is not a safety. I think it has around a 30% acceptance rate compared to the school-wide 60%.
Class periods with this professor consist of her coming in 5 minutes late... basically being force fed the chapter for 50 minutes outside of class.
UMass is pretty highly ranked in math and people seem to like it here

key_points: Chancellor received no-confidence votes from students, faculty, AND staff
Chancellor Reyes took $730k salary; didn't register to vote in MA until 2025
Library hours drastically cut since 2019 — students furious
key_quotes: Students, faculty, and staff have ALL voted no confidence in his leadership in less than 2 years.
Meanwhile Javier Reyes takes another 730k.
Saturday library hours today (our 'reading day'!) vs. on a Saturday back in 2019... I'm so jealous of you, alumni.

key_points: Amherst town is college-dominated, walkable, intellectually stimulating
Five College Consortium gives access to Amherst, Smith, Hampshire, Mount Holyoke
Hampshire College just closed — consortium now effectively four schools
key_quotes: Lots of good intellectual conversation in public. In summer, lots of art and music.
I had the advantage of having a UMass Research Library at my disposal.
Long live the FOUR college consortium.

key_points: Engineering got $50M donation from retired Apple exec — strong signal
Economics and CS grads report solid job outcomes from threads
Isenberg School of Management has good reputation but is hard to access
key_quotes: Retired Apple executive Daniel Riccio is donating $50 million over 10 years to UMass Amherst.
I graduated from UMass Lowell due to the fact that my family was poor... and I graduated with a CS degree in 2015 and hold steady job today.
A few of their programs even outperform very selective schools like NEU and BC.

key_points: Strong value for in-state students who get merit aid or honors scholarships
Middle-class in-state families with no aid now face private-school pricing
OOS without scholarship is hard to justify at $39k+/year
key_quotes: my brother went there in 2008 because it was his cheapest option and right now its the most expensive option for me
Go where the money is, I promise it will make a difference.
I'm a first-year student at UMass Amherst... luckily I didn't get in [to UPenn]

key_points: Big school energy: loud, fun, passionate alumni who genuinely miss it
Strong sense of humor and community on r/umass — campus has character
Alumni consistently say they'd go back; pandemic students feel cheated
key_quotes: I would pay money to go back to UMass and live like an undergrad again for a week.
UMass in the early-mid 90s was kinda magical.
It's been hard coming to a new school but the people here continue to prove to me that I made the right choice.

key_points: Safety: alleged drug spiking at frat parties reported by sophomore
Facilities: asbestos detected in Machmer Hall; cockroaches in labs daily
Predators: physics department staff member accused of prior misconduct with minor
key_quotes: i drank it with him and maybe around 10 minutes afterwards i had such intense nausea
many rooms in Machmer are testing at 'detectable' levels of asbestos
Christopher Ertl... was walked out of my high school physics class for sexting a 14-year-old boy. Now he is working at UMass.

key_points: Commonwealth Honors College offers smaller-school feel inside big university
Five College cross-registration is a real and underused academic advantage
Student-built tools and creative community projects show high initiative
key_quotes: Got sick of the student job board so I made a better one.
I learned a LOT from my UMass classes, and took advantage of the University's resources, like world-class Theater facilities at the Fine Arts Center.
I GOT INTO UMASS AHMERST CS WITH PROLLY THE MOST 'AVERAGE' LOOKING STATS. BOIS THIS IS INSANE!!!
